non_blocking_findings: Shard-level inconclusive notes were caused by split file visibility and a conditional large-file concern; the final synthesis resolved them as PASS after seeing the helper is 111 lines and the main projection delegates one_screen generation.
The new one-screen helper duplicates small local asArray/normalizeString utilities; this is acceptable for a bounded extraction but could be unified in a later projection cleanup.
test/workbench-projection.test.js remains a planned-refactor large test file; this pre-existing test-size debt is outside the bounded one-screen extraction.

scope.diff_summary: Extracted one_screen next_actions/counters generation from createWorkbenchProjection into src/workflow/workbench-one-screen.js, re-exported the helper, added direct counter/readout coverage, and updated large-file governance line counts.
gates_reviewed: Large-file governance and known-risk ledger tests passed 17/17.

notes: DeepSeek reviewed the bounded one-screen extraction and found no blocking behavior, contract, or governance issue. The implementation preserves one_screen next_actions/counters through a helper and adds focused counter/readout coverage while keeping the existing projection and mobile tests.
